---
name: Data source request
about: Request a new API, feed, or integration
title: "[Data source] "
labels: data-source
---

## Source overview

- **Name / provider**:
- **Public URL or documentation**:
- **Data type** (market, government, CRM, enrichment, other):

## Tier justification

- [ ] **Tier 1** — Official / regulatory / required for compliance
- [ ] **Tier 2** — Market or broker data
- [ ] **Tier 3** — Enrichment or optional signal

Explain why this tier fits.

## Use cases

How SalesEdge should use this data (dashboards, scoring, agents, ingestion).

## Access

- [ ] Public / open API
- [ ] API key required (describe procurement)
- [ ] Paid / contract only

## Technical notes

Rate limits, authentication scheme (OAuth, API key header), expected refresh cadence, and data format (JSON, CSV, etc.).

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Connector or ingestion path identified
- [ ] Freshness / SLA expectations documented
- [ ] Legal / ToS considerations noted
